Doctor Consultation For Appointments & Enquiries                   +91 8052288883 | +91 7607857011 +91 0522-4011190 Since 1989 World-Class Orthopaedics Hospital in Lucknow Joint Replacement, Arthroscopy, Spine Surgery & Trauma Care Explore Contact Us Book A Test Health Checkup Our Facilities Locate Us Aliganj Orthopaedic & Arthroscopy Centre Your Trusted Orthopedic & Joint Replacement Hospital in Lucknow Established in 2010, Aliganj Orthopaedic & Arthroscopy Centre is a 40-bed super-specialty hospital offering advanced orthopedic and surgical care in Lucknow, with orthopaedics, joint replacement, arthroscopy, spine surgery, and trauma care as our core specialties. We combine modern technology, internationally trained specialists, and a patient-first approach to deliver outcomes you can trust. Whether you need complex joint replacement, arthroscopy, spine surgery, fracture care, or orthopedic consultation, our experienced team is here for you. ​ Aliganj Orthopaedic & Arthroscopy Centre is a super-specialty hospital in Lucknow focused on orthopaedics, joint replacement, arthroscopy, spine surgery, and trauma care. Led by experienced orthopaedic surgeons, we provide advanced treatment, modern operation theatres, physiotherapy support, and patient-first care. Founded & Led By Dr. D.P. Singh 35+ years dedicated to orthopaedics | 4,000 Knee Replacements | 3,000 Hip Replacements | 1,000 Shoulder Replacements Fellowships: Hip Replacement (Exeter, UK), Knee Arthroscopy (Melbourne, Australia), Spine Surgery (Singapore) Trained under legends like Dr. K.K. Dholakia (Bombay Hospital) Meet Our Founder Orthopedic Centre of Excellence in Lucknow Led by one of Lucknow’s most experienced orthopaedic teams Advanced Orthopaedic Services Total Knee Replacement Total Hip Replacement Shoulder Replacement & Arthroscopy Knee & Shoulder Keyhole (Arthroscopic) Surgery Spine Surgery & Disc Procedures Complex Trauma & Fracture Management Pain Clinic & Ozone Therapy High Volume + Modern Infrastructure 120–150 joint replacements per year ~1,800 orthopaedic, arthroscopy, trauma & spine surgeries annually 3 advanced operation theatres with laminar flow Image intensifier, ventilators, high-end anaesthesia systems Dedicated physiotherapy & rehabilitation unit Why Patients Trust Aliganj Orthopaedic & Arthroscopy Centre 35+ Years of Orthopaedic Leadership Thousands of successful joint replacements and complex surgeries Fellowships and advanced training from UK, Australia & Singapore International Training & Expertise Many departments under one roof, coordinated care when needed Multi-Specialty Advantage 40 beds, 3 advanced OTs, Pharmacy & lab Modern Infrastructure Clear communication, ethical practice, personalized treatment plans Building a true super-specialty orthopaedic centre of excellence in Lucknow Patient-Centric Philosophy Vision for the Future Orthopedic Care Supported by Trusted Specialties Orthopaedics at the core, supported by trusted specialties To play, press and hold the enter key. To stop, release the enter key. Orthopedic care is supported by trusted specialties and modern diagnostic facilities, giving patients coordinated treatment when needed.
